rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0020
rows.name:
I honestly thought about going out
to look for you myself, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0030
rows.name: unfortunately, my Doll broke down on me[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0035
rows.name: So I figured I'd take shelter here for the time being.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0040
rows.name:
I believed that you would
definitely find me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0050
rows.name: Haha, you never betray my expectations as always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0065
rows.name: Time to turn the tables[ST:wide ]— it's our turn from here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33530100_MSG0070
rows.name: Let's show that bastard Void what we're made of![ST:wait ]
